banner.title: Seedance 2.0 AI Video Generator
banner.description: Seedance 2.0 adopts a unified multimodal audio-video joint generation architecture that supports text, image, audio, and video inputs, leading to the most comprehensive multimodal content reference and editing capabilities in the industry.

tabs.title: Text to Video
tabs.subTitle: Prompt
tabs.placeholder: Describe the video you want to generate...

tabs.title: Image to Video
tabs.subTitle: Image
tabs.tips: Upload JPG/PNG/WEBP images up to 10MB, minimum width/height of 300px.

details.title: Immersive Audio-visual Experience
details.description: Featuring exceptional motion stability and audio-video joint generation, Seedance 2.0 delivers an ultra-realistic immersive experience.

details.title: Motion Stability in Dynamic Scenes
details.description: Official examples show stable camera motion, coherent action, and synchronized crowd audio in fast-paced sports scenes.

details.title: Create with Director-level Control
details.description: Supporting images, audios and videos as references, Seedance 2.0 enables creators to transform an idea into visuals with full control over performance, lighting, shadow, and camera movement.

details.title: Reference-based Editing and Video Extension
details.description: Official reference-to-video examples demonstrate extending existing footage, removing unwanted elements, and preserving style continuity.

details.title: Empower Creativity
details.description: Seedance 2.0 delivers cinematic output aligned with industry standards, driving efficiency gains across the industry.

details.title: Creativity Unleashed, Explore the Possibilities
details.description: Browse our curated showcase to spark your next great idea.

usageGuide.title: How to Use Seedance 2.0
usageGuide.description: Create high-quality videos with multimodal references and audio-video joint generation.

steps.title: Prepare Inputs and References
steps.description: Start with text prompts, then add optional image, audio, or video references to guide visual style, action, and rhythm.

steps.title: Direct the Scene
steps.description: Use multimodal references to control performance, lighting, camera movement, and timing, then refine with reference-to-video editing when needed.

steps.title: Generate and Iterate
steps.description: Render your video, review motion and audio alignment, then iterate quickly with additional references or edits for production-ready results.

faq.name: faq
faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Learn more about Seedance 2.0 and its official capabilities.

items.title: What is Seedance 2.0?
items.description: Seedance 2.0 adopts a unified multimodal audio-video joint generation architecture that supports text, image, audio, and video inputs, leading to the most comprehensive multimodal content reference and editing capabilities in the industry.

items.title: What input modalities does Seedance 2.0 support?
items.description: Seedance 2.0 supports text, image, audio, and video inputs in a unified multimodal generation workflow.

items.title: What does “Immersive Audio-visual Experience” mean?
items.description: Featuring exceptional motion stability and audio-video joint generation, Seedance 2.0 delivers an ultra-realistic immersive experience.

items.title: How does Seedance 2.0 provide director-level control?
items.description: Supporting images, audios and videos as references, Seedance 2.0 enables creators to transform an idea into visuals with full control over performance, lighting, shadow, and camera movement.

items.title: Can Seedance 2.0 be used for editing or extending videos?
items.description: Yes. Official reference-to-video examples show tasks such as extension, cleanup, and controlled scene updates while preserving style consistency.

items.title: What types of projects can it support?
items.description: Seedance 2.0 delivers cinematic output aligned with industry standards, driving efficiency gains across the industry.

items.title: How is Seedance 2.0 evaluated officially?
items.description: Below are the results of Seedance 2.0 in internal benchmarks using SeedVideoBench-2.0. Seedance 2.0 is in the leading position in various dimensions across different types of tasks.

items.title: Where can I see more official examples?
items.description: Browse our curated showcase to spark your next great idea.
